message:
Command `# _PNR_LIBS is the list of lib files. We need to build this manually.
# From _env.tcl we have LIB variable with corner-lib pairs.
# Let's extract just the library file paths.
python3 << 'EOF'
# Parse the LIB variable from _env.tcl to get the lib file paths
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/_env.tcl') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find LIB definition
import re
lib_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(LIB\) "(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if lib_match:
    lib_str = lib_match.group(1)
    # Extract just the file paths (not the pattern keys)
    paths = re.findall(r'(/\S+\.lib)', lib_str)
    print("LIB paths:", paths)
    
# Also look for MACRO_LIB
macro_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(MACRO_LIBS\).*?"(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if macro_match:
    print("MACRO_LIBS:", macro_match.group(1))
    
# Also EXTRA_LIB
extra_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(EXTRA_LIBS\).*?"(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if extra_match:
    print("EXTRA_LIBS:", extra_match.group(1))
EOF` executed with exit code -1.

EOF"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command exited with code 2 and error:
/bin/bash: line 27: warning: here-document at line 4 delimited by end-of-file (wanted `EOF')
/bin/bash: -c: line 28: syntax error: unexpected end of file

extras.command:
# _PNR_LIBS is the list of lib files. We need to build this manually.
# From _env.tcl we have LIB variable with corner-lib pairs.
# Let's extract just the library file paths.
python3 << 'EOF'
# Parse the LIB variable from _env.tcl to get the lib file paths
with open('/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/32-openroad-globalrouting/_env.tcl') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find LIB definition
import re
lib_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(LIB\) "(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if lib_match:
    lib_str = lib_match.group(1)
    # Extract just the file paths (not the pattern keys)
    paths = re.findall(r'(/\S+\.lib)', lib_str)
    print("LIB paths:", paths)
    
# Also look for MACRO_LIB
macro_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(MACRO_LIBS\).*?"(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if macro_match:
    print("MACRO_LIBS:", macro_match.group(1))
    
# Also EXTRA_LIB
extra_match = re.search(r'set ::env\(EXTRA_LIBS\).*?"(.*?)"', content, re.DOTALL)
if extra_match:
    print("EXTRA_LIBS:", extra_match.group(1))
EOF
